title: Diamond Dreamstage 2.0 Arise Luxe Firm Quilted Hybrid 15" Mattress

seo.title: Diamond Dreamstage 2.0 Arise Luxe Firm 15" Hybrid Mattress | LA Mattress
seo.description: Diamond Dreamstage 2.0 Arise Luxe Firm — 15" firm hybrid with 7-Series pocketed coils + HD edge support. Built for back and stomach sleepers. Queen $1,599. Free LA delivery + 120-night exchange.

metafields.custom.tagline: Firm-feel 15" hybrid — built for back and stomach sleepers who don't want to sink.
metafields.custom.lede: Diamond's Dreamstage 2.0 Arise Luxe Firm is the same 7-Series pocketed-coil platform as the Plush and Medium variants, with the comfort stack tuned to an 8 / 10 firm feel. Cool-temperature quilted top, CertiPUR HD comfort foams, HD foam-encased edges. 20-year warranty.

description_html:
The Diamond Dreamstage 2.0 Arise Luxe Firm is a 15-inch quilted hybrid mattress tuned to a firm 8 / 10 feel — the build back and stomach sleepers ask for after a mattress that lets the hips drop. Same 7-Series pocketed coil unit and HD foam-encased edges as the Plush and Medium, with a denser comfort stack.

What's inside

  • Cool-temperature regulating quilt — phase-change yarns keep the surface from heat-soaking.
  • Air Response Foam (firm-tuned) — open-cell top layer that breathes; specced firmer for this variant.
  • CertiPUR-US HD comfort foams — independently certified, denser transition stack than the Plush or Medium.
  • 7-Series Individually Pocketed Coils — each coil works in its own fabric pocket; spinal support without partner-motion telegraph.
  • HD Foam-Encased Edge Support — high-density perimeter so the bed is usable to the edge.

Who it's for

Firm feel — a true 8 / 10. That's the configuration back sleepers and stomach sleepers tend to land on after trying medium — the surface holds the hips up so the spine stays flat. Heavier shoppers and people working through chronic lower-back pain tend to prefer this build for the same reason. Strict side sleepers should look at the Plush instead; an 8 / 10 firm surface can dig at the shoulder.

Sizes & prices

Twin, Twin XL, Full, Queen, King, and California King. Queen from $1,599.

What's included

  • Free white-glove delivery + setup anywhere in Los Angeles on $499+ orders.
  • Free haul-away of your old mattress on every Queen+ delivery.
  • Same-day delivery on orders placed by 4 p.m.
  • 120-night comfort exchange.
  • 20-year Diamond Mattress warranty.
